steps.title: Connect reliance to response
steps.content: Residents rely on the Recife Metro for millions of trips each year. Because so many trips depend on the system, city officials work to maintain the stations so journeys run smoothly.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice A would introduce an example, but the second sentence is a result. Choice C would signal contrast, though the ideas align. Choice D would signal an alternative, which the text does not present. The answer is B.
